title: alsine geniculata var. extensa
intro: Alsine geniculata var. extensa, also known as the Alpine Penny-cress or Creeping Penny-cress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Alsine geniculata var. extensa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
